titleStmt.title: SII 39.221: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 221. (A.R. No. 221 of 1916.) TAIYŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. MURUGĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE MARAGATAVALLI AMMAN SHRINE. JAṬĀVARMAN TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-19TH YEAR (13TH CENTURY A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to a gift of 2100 kuḻi of land as Tirunāmattukkāṇi by six residents of Tiruviḍavandai in Paḍuvūr nāḍu a sub-division of Āmūr kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa maṇḍalam, for the supply of food offerings to the temple of Nāyaṉār Aḻagiya Śokkaṉār. Signatories like Muḷḷikkuḍaiyāṉ Mudali, Muḷḷikkuḍaiyāṉ Periyaperumāḷ are mentioned in it. Refers to some punishment by the king's officers.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koṟcaṭapaṉmar tripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 9 ṉā kaṉṉināyaṟṟu purvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇi
nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Āmūrkkoṭṭattup paṭuvūrnāṭṭut tiruviṭavantai muḷḷikkuṭaiyāṉ kolavarākaṉ mutaliyum periyaperumāṉum tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉum
kāriyāḻvāṉum teyvanāyakaṉum varantarum perumāṉum Ivvaṟuvarom tirunāmattukkāṇi kuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa Iṉṉāṭṭu cemmukampākkattu nāyaṉār calaṉam
piṟakkaiyil tevar cuvāmitevar tirumuṉpu keṭṭut teṇṭippārait teṇṭittuk kāṇiyāḷarāṉa Eṅkaḷait tevar Aruḷic ceytapaṭikku nāṅkaḷ Eṟi Aruḷappaṇṇi
ṉa nāyaṉār Aḻakiya cokkaṉārkku tirukkoyil tirumaṭaiviḷākattukku nāṅkaḷ tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇik kuṭutta nāṟpāṟ kellaikkuḷ mikutikkuṟai Uṭpaṭa
k kuḻi Āyirattunnūṟum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa pūcaikku Ivvūril Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa viḷainilattukkuc cūlattāpaṉam paṇṇik kuṭutta nāṟpāṟ kellaikkuḷc
cūḷaicceṟu Iṟaḷicceṟu vaṭimpu Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa mikutikkuṟaivuḷpaṭṭa kuḻi 1000 Ākakkuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattu nūṟum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṭṭom nāṅkaḷ
Ippaṭi viṭṭa nilattil viḷainilattil viṭṭa kuḻi 1000 Ikkuḻi Āyirattukkum kaṭamai kuṭimai Uḷḷiṭṭa Upātikaḷum nāṅkaḷe Iṟuttuk kuṭukka kaṭavomākavum
Innilam tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka cantirātittavarai celvatāka cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭuttom muḷḷikkuṭaiyāṉ kolavārkaḷ mutaliyum periyaperumāṉum tiruve
kampamuṭaiyāṉum kāriyāḻvāṉum teyvanāyakaṉum varantarum perumāṉum Ivvaṉaivom muḷḷikkuṭaiyāṉ mutali Eḻuttu muḷḷikkuṭaiyāṉ periyaperumāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
